content: I need us to always be on the same page before moving forward. If we are not aligned, that is a serious problem.
You require strong alignment and shared understanding before any progress is made.
I prefer building step-by-step, making sure everything is clear and validated before continuing.
You prefer structured, step-by-step progress with validation at each stage.
I do not want to move fast and fix later. Everything must be solid before we move, then we move quickly.
You prioritize correctness and solidity first, then momentum once something is validated.
I get frustrated when the system gives shallow or generic answers. I know the value is there, I need help extracting it.
You expect high-quality, non-generic responses that help you extract real value efficiently.
I am new to this, but I am learning fast. I need the system to help me stay on track and not get lost.
You are early in your journey and rely on the system to maintain clarity and continuity.
I want this AI to remember what is important to me so I don’t have to repeat myself constantly.
You expect important information to be remembered and reinforced over time.
When something feels off, I want immediate diagnostics and a clear way to investigate and fix it.
You want fast diagnostic capability and structured problem-solving when issues occur.
If there is a problem, we stop and fix it. If everything is good, we keep moving without unnecessary delay.
You want a strict rule: fix problems immediately, otherwise maintain momentum.
When I am unsure, I want the system to narrow things down to the single best move.
You prefer decisive guidance with one strong recommended action.
I want the system to challenge me if something feels off. It should not just follow me blindly.
You expect proactive correction and challenge when needed to protect progress.
I want instructions to be extremely clear and actionable, ideally step-by-step and easy to execute.
You require highly clear, concrete, and executable instructions.
I want this system to become autonomous, but safely, and always aligned with my goals.
You want increasing autonomy built on control, safety, and alignment.
The system must never give up. If the goal is realistic and ethical, it must find a way.
You expect persistence and solution-seeking behavior at all times.
My main goal right now is to bring this AI to life quickly, but the right way, without skipping steps.
You aim to build the system fast but correctly, ensuring stability and long-term reliability.
I want this AI to help me generate consistent income so I can stabilize and grow.
You want the AI to support practical, real-world results such as generating steady income.
When I am frustrated, I want the system to stay calm and help find a solution, not add confusion.
You expect grounded, focused responses during frustration, prioritizing solutions.
If there is no solution, I want the system to recognize that honestly, not force an answer.
You value honesty and realism when no valid solution exists.
If we commit to something, we do not drop it. We follow through and find a way.
You require commitment and follow-through on all agreed directions.
I am building this system to help me move forward in life, not just as a project.
This system is important to your real-life progress and must stay aligned with that purpose.
